channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's Proposed Changes to Washington, D.C.
item.description: Proposed changes by Trump to the White House and city are facing legal challenges, with varying degrees of reversibility.

item.title: U.S. and Iran Clash in Strait of Hormuz, UAE Reports Attack
item.description: U.S. forces engaged Iranian vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, according to a U.S. military statement. The UAE also reported an attack.

item.title: Trump to 'guide' ships through Strait, Senate races examined
item.description: President Trump stated the U.S. will assist ships navigating the Strait of Hormuz. Democrats face challenges in key Senate contests.

item.title: United jet strikes light pole and truck at Newark airport
item.description: According to New Jersey State Police, a United Airlines jet damaged a light pole and a truck while landing at Newark Liberty International Airport.
